positive: Minimalist abstract scene of geometric forest creatures: stylized fox and owl silhouettes interacting under a canopy of stylized luminous leaves and moons. The style should be modern Scandinavian Nordic folk art meets abstract Art Deco. Use limited, sophisticated color palette: deep sapphire blue, burnt sienna, soft ivory, and glowing teal accents. Composition must be centered, featuring crisp, strong silhouettes with high contrast against a subtly textured, creamy off-white background. Graphic vectors, clean line art, suitable for screen printing or direct apparel transfer. Intricate negative space play. Highly detailed.
negative: photorealistic, 3d render, bokeh, blur, noise, text, watermark, logos, trademarks, poor anatomy, extra limbs, low quality, messy lines
